title: Disable Villager Trades
description: Turns every villager into nitwin so you can't trade with them.
body:
# Notes
- All villagers turn into nitwins **PERMANENTLY** and its impossible to restore villagers.Villager trading will be permanently disabled in affected areas. Ensure you have backups of your world before using this datapack.

# Description
- This datapack automatically converts all villagers within a 25-block radius of the player into nitwit villagers every second, making trading permanently impossible. Use with caution, as the changes are continuous and irreversible!
